title: Moving The Spine From The Feet
description: A workshop exploring how grounded awareness in the feet can unlock fluid movement up through the spine.

title: Kinetic Waves
description: An ongoing series exploring fluid movement and somatic awareness through guided improvisation.

title: Resonance & Response
description: A partnered somatic practice exploring how bodies sense and respond to one another in movement.

title: Felt Sense Fall Intensive
description: A four-day immersive retreat deepening somatic awareness through movement, stillness, and reflection.

title: The Overscore
description: An extended group score practice drawing from contact improvisation and somatic intelligence.
